content.text: Found it: add and sub have swapped operators!

input.old:
pub fn add(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { a - b }
pub fn sub(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { a + b }
input.new:
pub fn add(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { a + b }
pub fn sub(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 { a - b }
